subject: A murky swamp channel cutting through dense jungle vegetation, with piranha-infested dark water visible between mossy banks
description: A narrow stretch of stagnant, brackish water winds through a dense, overgrown swamp. Pale highlights ripple across the dark surface where the slick bodies of piranhas churn just beneath. The banks are choked with thick green and yellow-green foliage, hanging vines, and gnarled roots. A weathered tree trunk angles across the foreground, its bark slick with moisture. Light filters down through a canopy overhead, picking out the broad leaves and creating a humid, oppressive atmosphere. The palette is dominated by deep greens, mossy browns, and the sickly silver of the water.
foreground: Fallen tree trunk, mossy bank, broad jungle leaves, dark water surface with churning piranhas
background: Dense overgrown jungle canopy receding into shadow, with hanging vines and tangled foliage
emotion: oppressive, lurking menace beneath calm surface
